feature.name: CSS find-in-page highlight pseudos
feature.creator: dazabani@igalia.com
feature.summary: This feature exposes **find-in-page** search result styling to authors as a highlight pseudo-element, like selection and spelling errors. This allows authors to change the foreground and background colors or add text decorations, which can be especially useful if the browser defaults have insufficient contrast with the page colors or are otherwise unsuitable.
